summary: 4 years of experience as a Process Engineer. Focused on measurable business outcomes in mühendislik / üretim / kalite with hands-on experience in Root Cause Analysis, FMEA, OEE, ISO 9001.
title: Process Engineer

experiences.description: Used Root Cause Analysis, FMEA, ISO 9001 to standardized team operations. Improved a core KPI by 2.1x and documented repeatable operating practices for the team.
achievements: Delivered projects using Root Cause Analysis and FMEA
Coordinated releases with stakeholders and reduced operational risk
